case_number: constrained to observe that no case

chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Present: Irshad Ali Shah, J. Agha Faisal, J. CP D197of 2015: Aurangzeb and another vs. D.E.O. Shikarpur others For the Petitioner: Mr. Faiz Muhammad Larik, Advocate For the Respondents: Mr.Abdul Hamid Bhurgri, Addl. A.G. Dates of hearing: 22.02.2022 Date of announcement: 22.02.2022 ORDER Agha Faisal, J. The petitioners seek appointment as Primary School Teacher (PST) on account that they have been duly qualified in such regard. The comments filed by the respondents demonstrate that one of the petitioners was rejected on account of Domicile while the other could not be enlisted on account of having lesser marks than the successful candidates.No vested right has been demonstrated before us to consider the relief claimed by the petitioners. In view hereof, this Court is constrained to observe that no case has been set forth for the invocation of the discretionary writ jurisdiction of this Court, hence, this petition is hereby dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE Per Ijaz Ul Ahsan J. in Syed Iqbal Hussain Shah Gillani vs. PBC & Others reported as 2021 SCMR 425; Muhammad Fiaz Khan vs. Ajmer Khan & Another reported as 2010 SCMR 105.
